description: Detects typedefs that hide pointer types, making ownership and nullability unclear. Simplified from Rust: flags all type_definition nodes containing pointer_declarator without checking for function pointer typedefs, opaque pointer patterns, or const qualifiers. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Typedef hides a pointer type -- makes ownership and nullability unclear to callers. Consider using explicit pointer syntax (e.g., Foo *) instead of hiding it in the typedef. Exception: opaque pointer patterns (typedef struct Impl *Handle) and function pointer typedefs are acceptable.
